---
title: "The Rt. Rev. William Grant Broughton"
---

## The Rt. Rev. William Grant Broughton

**Dates:** (1788-1853)

### Description

Bishop of Australia

### Biography

He was buried in the nave of Canterbury Cathedral on 26 February 1853.

### Letters

- Letter from March 17th [1853]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
